## 📋 Description

*Describe the changes proposed by this Pull Request. Include context, rationale, and any specific implementation details.*

---

## 🛠️ Type of Change

Please check the options that apply:

- [ ] ✨ **feat**: New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 🐛 **fix**: Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ♻️ **refactor**: Code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature
- [ ] ⚡ **perf**: Performance improvement
- [ ] 📝 **docs**: Documentation updates
- [ ] 🤖 **ci**: CI/CD pipeline or configuration modifications
- [ ] 🔧 **chore**: General maintenance tasks (dependency updates, tool config)

---

## 🚀 Pre-Merge Checklist

- [ ] 🔍 My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] ✍️ I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] 💬 I have added clear comments in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] 📖 My changes generate no new warnings or console errors
- [ ] 📚 I have updated corresponding documentation (`README.md`, `BRANCHING_STRATEGY.md`, etc.)
- [ ] 🧪 All new and existing tests pass locally
